Christina Campbell MacDougall
Gender: 	Female

Craignish, Argyll, Scotland

Lorn, Argyll, Scotland
Immediate Family: 	
Daughter of Dougal Campbell and * Campbell

zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Campbell於1291年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可萊尼尼希時，她的父親Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish42歲，母親Lady Christina MacNaughton44歲。她於大約1329年與Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1354年5月在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Campbell于1291年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾可萊尼尼希时，她的父亲Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish42岁，母亲Lady Christina MacNaughton44岁。她于大约1329年与Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1354年5月在苏格兰阿吉爾享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Campbell was born in 1291, in Craignish, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish, was 42 and her mother, Lady Christina MacNaughton, was 44. She married Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn about 1329, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in May 1354, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina Campbell est née en 1291, à Craignish, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Christina MacNaughton, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn environ 1329, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en mai 1354, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina Campbell 1291 in Craignish, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish 42 und ihre Mutter Lady Christina MacNaughton 44. Sie hat um 1329 in Argyll, Scotland Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb im Mai 1354 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Campbell è nata il nel 1291 nel Craignish, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Lady Christina MacNaughton, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn circa 1329, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel maggio 1354, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina Campbellが1291年にスコットランドアルグイルクレイグニッシュで生まれた時，父Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignishは42歳，母Lady Christina MacNaughtonは44歳であった。約1329年にスコットランドアルグイルでIain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1354年5月にスコットランドアルグイルで63歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Campbell(이)가 1291년 스컷랜드 아그이 크레이그니시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Christina MacNaughton(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1329년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1354년 5월 스컷랜드 아그이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Campbell nasceu em 1291, em Craignish, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christina MacNaughton, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn aproximadamente 1329, em Argyll, Scotland. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Campbell родилась в 1291 г. в местности креигниш, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Christina MacNaughton, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn около 1329 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла май 1354 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christina Campbell nació en 1291, en Craignish, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Sir Dugald Campbell 7th. Laird of Craignish, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Christina MacNaughton, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Iain "John" MacDougall 8th. of Dunollie and Lorn aproximadamente 1329, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en mayo de 1354, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Scotland.
